narrative:
Homer TWP township has 707 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.1 percentage points.
